title: An Ordinance amending Ordinance No. 2023 - 2381 dated December 4, 2023 entitled "An Ordinance for the Abolition and Creation of certain Plantilla Positions in the Organizational Structure and Staffing Pattern (OSSP) of various Departments/Offices/Units of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) and providing funds thereof and for other purposes
